title: Mellow Jamaican Chicken Curry
description: A tangy and flavorful Jamaican chicken curry dish featuring lemongrass stalks, perfect for a date night, and is FODMAP friendly.
instructions: In a large mason jar, combine chicken, lemongrass stalks, and infuse oil, and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
In a large pan, heat 1 tablespoon of infuse oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion to the pan and cook until it is translucent.
Add the garlic-free curry powder to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the marinated chicken to the pan and cook until it is browned on all sides.
Add the coconut milk, salt, and black pepper to the pan, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Remove the lemongrass stalks from the pan and discard.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
